objective: Build the first downstream feature layer that legally uses the V3.46 accepted daily-only adapter for coverage, liquidity/activity, breadth, and raw intraday diagnostics.
forbidden: Do not read raw daily CSVs directly outside AcceptedDailyOnlyAdapter.
Do not compute adjusted returns, total returns, valuation, dividends, or portfolio performance.
Do not mutate raw source files.
acceptance: All acquired dates must be processed through the accepted adapter.
Market feature rows must equal acquired daily files.
Accepted row totals must reconcile to V3.45.1 accepted processed rows.
Feature outputs must carry data_scope accepted_processed_daily_only and price_adjustment none_raw.
No bad OHLC rows may remain after adapter quarantine.
The report must state that no model or backtest promotion occurred.
